name: dptech-umc-ads-v5-3-29
description: OctoBus package for DPtech UMC ADS V5.3.29 login and blacklist APIs.

DPtech_UMC_ADS_v5329.DPtech_UMC_ADS_v532.name: login
DPtech_UMC_ADS_v5329.DPtech_UMC_ADS_v532.description: Login to DPtech UMC ADS and cache the returned token.

DPtech_UMC_ADS_v5329.DPtech_UMC_ADS_v532.name: query-blacklist
DPtech_UMC_ADS_v5329.DPtech_UMC_ADS_v532.description: Query DPtech UMC ADS blacklist strategies.

DPtech_UMC_ADS_v5329.DPtech_UMC_ADS_v532.name: add-blacklist
DPtech_UMC_ADS_v5329.DPtech_UMC_ADS_v532.description: Add IP addresses to DPtech UMC ADS blacklist strategies.

DPtech_UMC_ADS_v5329.DPtech_UMC_ADS_v532.name: delete-blacklist
DPtech_UMC_ADS_v5329.DPtech_UMC_ADS_v532.description: Delete IP addresses from DPtech UMC ADS blacklist strategies.
